# Technical Risks: [Product Name]

## Risk Register

### RISK-NNN: [Risk Title]

| Property | Value |
|----------|-------|
| **Severity** | CRITICAL / HIGH / MEDIUM / LOW |
| **Likelihood** | High / Medium / Low |
| **Impact** | [What happens if this risk materializes?] |
| **Category** | technical / security / dependency / infrastructure / performance / data |
| **Status** | open / mitigated / accepted / resolved |
| **Owner** | [Agent or human responsible for mitigation] |

**Description**: [Detailed description of the risk]

**Mitigation Strategy**: [How we plan to reduce or eliminate this risk]

**Contingency Plan**: [What we do if the risk materializes despite mitigation]

**Acceptance Criteria**: [How do we know this risk is resolved/mitigated?]

> **DECISION [YYYY-MM-DD]**: [If risk was accepted, document who accepted it and why]
